meta_desc: Promote your brand or message on Verbatims. Sponsored messages appear in the sponsor bar at the bottom of every page.
title: Sponsor
subtitle: Promote your brand, project, or message on Verbatims.
pricing_desc: Your message displayed in the sponsor bar at the bottom of every page.
feature_duration: Visible for 7 days in the sponsor bar
feature_content: Include a message, icons, and an optional link
login_prompt: You need to be logged in to purchase a sponsored message.
message_placeholder: Your message, e.g. Check out our new collection!
